title: senecio filaginoides var. lobulatus
intro: Senecio filaginoides var. lobulatus, also known as a variety of the burnet senecio, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Senecio filaginoides var. lobulatus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to potential hepatotoxicity.
